subject: Venipede, a red armored centipede-like bug Pokemon
description: A compact, heavily-armored red bug creature crouches low on the ground. It has two curved horns or antennae protruding from its head, yellow cat-like eyes, and a dark segmented body with a red carapace. The setting is a lush forest floor with trees and a large round purple fruit or berry visible to the right foreground. The overall lighting is warm, with soft greens and yellows in the background suggesting daytime in a woodland environment. The creature has a defensive, low-profile posture.
foreground: Venipede crouching low, red armored body, horn antennae
background: forest floor with trees, large purple fruit/berry to right
